title: Add bin/deploy.sh idempotent update script
userStory: As an operator, I want a single deploy command on the VPS so that updating brainbot is one keystroke and not a multi-line copy-paste from memory.
acceptanceCriteria: Behaviour: cd to repo root, git fetch + reset --hard origin/main (or git pull --ff-only — pick one and document why), docker compose pull, docker compose up -d --remove-orphans, docker image prune -f
Exits non-zero on any failed step (set -euo pipefail)
Prints a one-line summary at the end: 'deployed <short-sha> at <ts>, services: <count>'
Verify: SSH to VPS, run bin/deploy.sh after pushing a no-op commit; output shows the new sha and all services healthy
